name: Web page conversion with file output
prompt: Convert this web page to markdown and save it: https://example.com/article -o ./saved/article.md
expected_behavior: Use web-to-md or markitdown for the URL
Save output to specified file path using -o flag
success_criteria: Correctly passes --output/-o flag to save to file
Creates directory if it doesn't exist (or handles error)
Confirms successful write or reports failure clearly
edge_cases: Output directory doesn't exist → suggest creating it first with mkdir -p
Permission denied writing to path → suggest different location or permissions
File already exists → may overwrite without warning (document behavior)
